changes.comment: Fix Codex socket startup failure under deep state roots (long $HOME, long dispatcher/teammate names). When the descriptive socket path (state/<dispatcher>/.../codex.sock) exceeds the Unix sun_path budget, the socket now falls back to a short deterministic path under a private per-user runtime dir (XDG_RUNTIME_DIR, or a non-shared os tmpdir such as the macOS per-user $TMPDIR) instead of failing to start. The shared /tmp is never used; with no private root available the start still fails loudly. No action needed for existing installs whose paths fit the budget.
